landing.hero.lead1: If your report divides sales by all 30 days — it is wrong. We exclude the days an item was out of stock and show the
landing.hero.lead2: you can rely on to plan purchasing, analyze demand and control stock.
landing.int.text: Read-only access via the store API or Google Sheets. Each source = a separate warehouse.
landing.panel.text: See at a glance what is running out, what is turning into dead stock, and where money leaks because of miscalculated sales velocity.
landing.feat.h2: Six things that save you money
landing.feat.text: Every number is backed by methodology and a data-confidence score.
landing.feat1.title: TVelo — real sales velocity
landing.feat1.text: Computes sales velocity excluding the days an item was out of stock. The real picture: which products sell fast and which are turning into dead stock. The gap vs the naive formula can reach 50%.
landing.feat2.title: Coverage days
landing.feat2.text: How long your stock will last. A signal in advance — not after the item is already gone.
landing.feat3.title: Lost revenue
landing.feat3.text: How much revenue you lose while items are out of stock.
landing.feat4.title: Purchase planning
landing.feat4.text: Calculations based on real sales velocity and supplier lead time.
landing.feat5.title: Frozen stock
landing.feat5.text: How much money is frozen in slow-moving SKUs.
landing.feat6.title: Data confidence
landing.feat6.text: We score how reliable the data is for decision-making.
landing.cmp.text: What changes when you stop counting by hand
landing.test.h2: Sellers on the numbers they saw for the first time
landing.price.sub: 30-day trial — 15 warehouses free. No card required.
landing.cta.text: Connect a store — Shopify or Google Sheet. First report in 30 minutes, accurate analytics in 7 days.
landing.foot.tagline: Inventory management for e-commerce sellers. TVelo, coverage days, data confidence — numbers you can trust.
landing.demo.note2: the item was out of stock. TVelo counts only
